title: Maximum Protection
description: Makes all the protection enchantments compatible with each other.
body:
🛡️ Maximum Protection

![max-protection-diamond-chestplate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac950fd8d70a2b121f2383ce7601bb8d1fa6b7ed_0.webp)

This datapack removes the restriction that prevents different Protection enchantments from being used together, allowing you to combine them freely on the same armor piece.

🚀 Features
Allows all Protection enchantments to stack
Combine Fire, Blast, Projectile, and Regular Protection
Stronger and more customizable armor builds
Simple and lightweight

📦 Compatibility
✔️ Works with Minecraft 26.1.11
✔️ Compatible with most datapacks

🛠️ Installation
Download the datapack
Place it in your world's datapacks folder

📝 Notes
Only removes enchantment incompatibility
Vanilla enchant levels and limits are unchanged
Does not modify other enchantments or mechanics
